title: tsalmaveth #6757
definition:
1) death-shadow, deep shadow, deep darkness, shadow of death
    1a) death-shadow
    1b) death-shadow, deep shadow, darkness
    1c) death-shadow (of distress, extreme danger) (fig)
    1d) death-shadow (of place of the dead) (fig)
